messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Distinct topic icon for a paused ticket awaiting the human's approval
What it solves: WHAT / WHY. The per-topic icon (topicIcon.ts, BL-342/417/418) maps a ticket's
FOLDER + TYPE to one icon (✅ done, 🦠 defect-in-flight, 💡 feature-in-flight,
🔍 paused). resolveIconState does NOT consult human_approval today, so a paused
ticket blocked ONLY on the human's approval (actionable by him …
How it works: A paused ticket with human_approval pending resolves to a distinct awaiting-approval icon state
